title: Morning Coffee Preparation
summary: User wakes up and walks to the kitchen. They grind coffee beans using a hand grinder, boil water, and prepare a pour-over coffee.

title: Reading Technical Article on iPad
summary: User sits at the kitchen table and reads a technical article about large language model fine-tuning on their iPad.

title: Walking to Office through Park
summary: User leaves the apartment and walks through a small neighborhood park. Cherry blossom trees are in full bloom.

title: Team Standup Meeting
summary: User arrives at the office and joins a standup meeting with 4 colleagues. Discussion topics include the new API migration timeline.

title: Deep Work: Frontend Component Development
summary: User sits at their desk with dual monitors. They work on building React components in VS Code, frequently switching between the editor and Chrome DevTools.

title: Coffee Break with Colleague
summary: User walks to the office kitchen and chats with a colleague named Mia about an upcoming tech conference.
